summary: Release v0.3.3 with native Hermes capability detection and live proof
description: Promote the post-v0.3.2 Hermes prompt-capability repair and validated WSL proof into an immutable annotated v0.3.3 stack release so downstream repos no longer require GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV=1.
acceptance: R-1: Runtime, package, project contract, tests, and user-facing release references consistently identify 0.3.3 and v0.3.3.
R-2: The local Linux/WSL and release preflight gates pass at the release commit.
R-3: An annotated v0.3.3 tag resolves exactly to the pushed release commit and remote main/tag readback is clean.
